raw.message: Claim 5,000,000 Virtual Coins: Exclusive For New Users!

hook.summary: Cinematic wolf howl intro with a gold coin explosion.
hook.visual_action: Three wolves howl at a full moon as the game title appears and gold coins burst across the screen.

scene_flow: Cinematic intro with howling wolves and game branding.
Transition to slot reels showing the three different Timber Wolf pot features.
Demonstration of the combined Gold + Rising + Bucks gameplay mechanic with expanding reels.
Large Big Win celebration with a rapidly increasing coin counter and visual effects.
End card with game logo and Play Now call to action.
audience_proxy: Adult social casino players who enjoy high-energy slot machines with multiple bonus features.
